---
author: "Jacopo Olivieri"
date: last-modified
editor: source
format: html
number-sections: true
number-depth: 4
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  freeze: auto
  fig-width: 9
  fig-asp: 0.618
  fig-align: center
---

# Zoopla Rental Data Exploration {#sec-zoopla-exploration}

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Initialize packages with version control
if (!requireNamespace("renv", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("renv")
}

# Load required packages
required_packages <- c(
  "arrow",
  "rmarkdown",
  "rio",
  "tidyverse",
  "purrr",
  "here",
  "janitor",
  "sf",
  "sp",
  "DescTools",
  "modelsummary",
  "tmap",
  "leaflet",
  "htmltools",
  "viridis",
  "data.table",
  "reactable",
  "htmlwidgets",
  "reactablefmtr",
  "logger",
  "readxl"
)

install_if_missing <- function(packages) {
  new_packages <- packages[!sapply(packages, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]
  if (length(new_packages) > 0) {
    install.packages(new_packages)
  }
  invisible(sapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE))
}
install_if_missing(required_packages)

# Initialize logging
log_path <- here::here("output", "log", "zoopla_data_exploration.log")
if (!dir.exists(dirname(log_path))) {
  dir.create(dirname(log_path), recursive = TRUE)
}
logger::log_appender(logger::appender_file(log_path))
logger::log_layout(logger::layout_glue_colors)

# Ggplot theme
theme_pref <- theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 12,
      margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 10, unit = "pt")
    ),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    axis.text = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 8),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray95"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray95"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 10, l = 10, unit = "pt")
  )
```

```{r, load_data}
# Zoopla rentals
zoopla_rentals <- import(
  here::here("data", "processed", "zoopla", "zoopla_rentals.parquet"),
  trust = TRUE
)

# Aggregated spill data for rentals (cross section)
dat_agg_all <- arrow::open_dataset(
  here::here("data", "processed", "cross_section", "rentals", "all_years")
) %>%
  collect()

dat_agg_12mo <- arrow::open_dataset(
  here::here("data", "processed", "cross_section", "rentals", "prior_12mo")
) %>%
  collect()

# Spill sites (for mapping; used in eval: false section)
spill_sites <- import(
  here::here("data", "processed", "unique_spill_sites.parquet"),
  trust = TRUE
)

# Rental-to-spill lookup data (for mapping)
spill_rental_lookup <- import(
  here::here("data", "processed", "zoopla", "spill_rental_lookup.parquet"),
  trust = TRUE
)

# Aggregated spill data by year (for spill metrics in mapping)
dat_yr <- import(
  here::here("data", "processed", "agg_spill_stats", "agg_spill_yr.parquet"),
  trust = TRUE
)
```

## Data Description {#sec-01-zoopla-data-descr}

I spatially merge Zoopla rental listings (2021–2023) to nearby sewage discharge sites within multiple distance thresholds (e.g., 250m, 500m, 1km, 2km, 5km). For each rental, I summarise spill severity (counts and duration) over either all years or the prior 12 months and compute distances to the matched sites. This enables cross-sectional analyses by distance threshold and spill severity.

```{r, data_description_rentals}
#| eval: false

# Example map (requires a rental-to-site lookup with site_id and coordinates)
# The following is a template mirroring the house data mapping.

set.seed(1)

# Select a few London rentals for illustration
london_rentals <- zoopla_rentals %>%
  filter(region == "London") %>%
  filter(rental_id %in% c(422620, 450970, 118240))

# Get corresponding spill sites using the lookup process (mirroring house data)
sample_spill_sites <- spill_sites %>%
  inner_join(
    spill_rental_lookup %>%
      filter(rental_id %in% london_rentals$rental_id, distance_km <= 5) %>%
      distinct(site_id),
    by = "site_id"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    select(dat_yr, -ngr),
    by = join_by(water_company, site_id)
  )

# Convert rentals to sf (EPSG 27700: BNG)
rentals_sf <- st_as_sf(
  london_rentals,
  coords = c("easting", "northing"),
  crs = 27700
)
spill_sites_sf <- st_as_sf(
  sample_spill_sites,
  coords = c("easting", "northing"),
  crs = 27700
)

buffers_5km <- st_buffer(rentals_sf, dist = 5000)

# Transform to WGS84 for visualisation
rentals_sf <- st_transform(rentals_sf, 4326)
spill_sites_sf <- st_transform(spill_sites_sf, 4326)
buffers_5km <- st_transform(buffers_5km, 4326)

# London boundary
shp_path <- here(
  "data",
  "raw",
  "shapefiles",
  "local_authorities_uk_buc",
  "Local_Authority_Districts_(May_2025)_Boundaries_UK_BUC.shp"
)
london_boundary_sf <- st_read(shp_path) |>
  filter(LAD25CD %in% sprintf("E090%05d", 1:33)) # Get only London boundaries

tmap_mode("view")
tm <- tm_shape(buffers_5km) +
  tm_polygons(fill = "lightgreen", fill_alpha = 0.3, col_alpha = 0) +
  tm_shape(spill_sites_sf) +
  tm_bubbles(
    size = "spill_hrs_yr",
    fill = "spill_hrs_yr",
    fill.scale = tm_scale_intervals(
      values = "brewer.blues",
      n = 4
    ),
    size.scale = tm_scale_continuous(
      values.scale = 3
    ),
    size.legend = tm_legend_hide(),
    fill.legend = tm_legend(
      title = "Spill Duration"
    )
  ) +
  tm_shape(rentals_sf) +
  tm_symbols(
    fill = "listing_price",
    fill.scale = tm_scale_intervals(values = "brewer.reds"),
    shape = 18,
    size = 0.7,
    fill_alpha = 0.9,
    fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Listing Price (£)")
  ) +
  tm_shape(london_boundary_sf) +
  tm_borders(col = "blue4", lwd = 1) +
  tm_title("Sample Rentals with Spill Sites and 5km Buffers") +
  tm_layout(legend.outside = TRUE)

# tmap_save(
#   tm,
#   filename = here::here("book", "book_figs", "zoopla_data_descr.html"),
#   width = 800,
#   height = 600
# )
```

```{=html}
<iframe src="book_figs/zoopla_data_descr.html" width="800" height="600" frameborder="0"></iframe>
```

## Rental Descriptive Statistics {#sec-02-zoopla-descriptives}

Rental listing prices are positively skewed and closer to log-normal. There is heterogeneity across property types, number of bedrooms, and energy ratings.

### Summary Table {#sec-02-01-zoopla-summary-table}

```{css, table_css, echo = FALSE}
/* Custom CSS for modelsummary tables */
.table, th, td { font-size: 0.9em; }
.table th { font-size: 0.95em !important; white-space: normal !important; padding: 0.25em 0.5em !important; }
.table td { white-space: nowrap !important; padding: 0.25em 0.5em !important; }
```

::: panel-tabset

#### Summary {#sec-02-01-01-summary}
```{r, rentals_summary}
datasummary_dat <- zoopla_rentals %>%
  select(listing_price, year, property_type, bedrooms, epc_energy_rating) %>%
  mutate(
    property_type = recode_factor(
      property_type,
      "D" = "Detached",
      "S" = "Semi-Detached",
      "T" = "Terraced",
      "F" = "Flats/Maisonettes",
      "B" = "Bungalow"
    )
  ) %>%
  rename(
    `Property Type` = property_type,
    `Bedrooms` = bedrooms,
    `EPC Rating` = epc_energy_rating,
    `Listing Price` = listing_price,
    `Year` = year
  )

modelsummary::datasummary_skim(
  datasummary_dat,
  fmt = function(x) scales::number(x, accuracy = 0.01, big.mark = ",")
)
```

#### Price Heterogeneity {#sec-02-01-02-price-heterogeneity}
```{r, rentals_heterogeneity}
datasummary_dat %>%
  mutate(
    Bedrooms = factor(
      case_when(
        Bedrooms == 1 ~ "1",
        Bedrooms == 2 ~ "2",
        Bedrooms == 3 ~ "3",
        Bedrooms == 4 ~ "4",
        Bedrooms >= 5 ~ ">=5",
        TRUE ~ as.character(Bedrooms)
      ),
      levels = c("1", "2", "3", "4", ">=5")
    )
  ) %>%
  modelsummary::datasummary(
    `Listing Price` *
      (`Property Type` + `Bedrooms`) +
      Heading("Year", nearData = FALSE) * `Year` * Arguments(fmt = 2) ~
      Mean + SD + Min + Median + Max,
    data = .,
    fmt = function(x) scales::number(x, accuracy = 1, big.mark = ",")
  )
```

:::

### Histogram {#sec-02-02-zoopla-histogram}

::: panel-tabset

#### Prices {#sec-02-02-01-prices}
```{r, rentals_histogram}
ggplot(zoopla_rentals, aes(x = listing_price)) +
  geom_histogram(
    bins = 30,
    fill = viridis(1, option = "magma"),
    alpha = 0.8,
    col = "black"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Zoopla Listing Prices 2021–2023",
    x = "Listing Price (£)",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_pref
```

#### Log Prices {#sec-02-02-02-log-prices}
```{r, rentals_histogram_log}
ggplot(zoopla_rentals, aes(x = log(listing_price))) +
  geom_histogram(
    aes(y = after_stat(density)),
    bins = 100,
    fill = viridis(1, option = "magma"),
    alpha = 0.7,
    col = "black"
  ) +
  stat_function(
    fun = dnorm,
    args = list(
      mean = mean(log(zoopla_rentals$listing_price), na.rm = TRUE),
      sd = sd(log(zoopla_rentals$listing_price), na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    color = viridis(3, option = "magma")[2],
    alpha = .7,
    linewidth = .8
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Listing Prices (Log) with Normal Curve",
    x = "log(Listing Price)",
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_pref
```

#### Log Prices Q-Q Plot {#sec-02-02-03-qq}
```{r, rentals_qq_plot}
ggplot(zoopla_rentals, aes(sample = log(listing_price))) +
  stat_qq(color = viridis(1, option = "magma")) +
  stat_qq_line(color = viridis(3, option = "magma")[2], linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Q-Q Plot of log(Listing Price)",
    x = "Theoretical Quantiles",
    y = "Sample Quantiles"
  ) +
  theme_pref
```

:::

### Temporal Rental Distribution {#sec-02-03-zoopla-temporal}

```{r, rentals_temporal}
zoopla_dt <- as.data.table(zoopla_rentals)

zoopla_dt[, month_num := ((month_id - 1) %% 12) + 1L]
zoopla_dt[, month := factor(month.abb[month_num], levels = month.abb)]

rent_monthly <- zoopla_dt[,
  .(
    avg_price = mean(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    count_listed = .N
  ),
  by = .(year, month)
] %>%
  as_tibble()
rm(zoopla_dt)
```

::: panel-tabset

#### Listing Prices {#sec-02-03-01-listing-prices}

```{r, rentals_temporal_price}
ggplot(rent_monthly, aes(x = month, y = avg_price, fill = factor(year))) +
  geom_bar(
    stat = "identity",
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
    width = 0.8,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "magma") +
  labs(
    title = "Average Monthly Listing Price (2021–2023)",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Average Listing Price (£)",
    fill = "Year"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme_pref +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::label_number(big.mark = ","),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))
  )
```

#### Number of Listings {#sec-02-03-02-num-listings}
```{r, rentals_temporal_count}
ggplot(rent_monthly, aes(x = month, y = count_listed, fill = factor(year))) +
  geom_bar(
    stat = "identity",
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
    width = 0.8,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "magma") +
  labs(
    title = "Monthly Rental Listings Count (2021–2023)",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Number of Listings",
    fill = "Year"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::label_number(big.mark = ","),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))
  )
```

:::

## Rentals and Sewage Spills: Descriptive Statistics {#sec-03-zoopla-spills}

### Cross Section {#sec-03-01-zoopla-cross}

I examine cross-sectional relationships between rental prices and sewage spills along three dimensions: listing price, spill severity (counts and duration), and distance to discharge sites.

### Summary Tables {#sec-03-02-zoopla-summary-tables}

```{r, rentals_trim}
# Trim listing prices at the 5th and 95th percentiles
zoopla_rentals_trimmed <- zoopla_rentals %>%
  filter(between(
    listing_price,
    quantile(listing_price, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    quantile(listing_price, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)
  ))
trimmed_rental_ids <- unique(zoopla_rentals_trimmed$rental_id)
```

::: panel-tabset

#### By Distance {#sec-03-02-01-by-distance}

```{r, rentals_spill_summary_by_distance}
# Prepare aggregated datasets and align naming
dat_agg_all2 <- dat_agg_all %>% mutate(listing_price = rent)

dat_agg_all_trimmed <- dat_agg_all2 %>%
  filter(rental_id %in% trimmed_rental_ids)

rentals_within_5000 <- dat_agg_all_trimmed %>%
  filter(radius == 5000) %>%
  pull(rental_id) %>%
  unique()

# Summary stats for rentals beyond 5000m
dat_above_5000 <- zoopla_rentals_trimmed %>%
  filter(!(rental_id %in% rentals_within_5000)) %>%
  summarise(
    threshold_m = ">5000",
    n_rentals = dplyr::n_distinct(rental_id),
    n_spill_sites = 0,
    mean_price = mean(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_price = median(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_price = sd(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_price = min(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_price = max(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# Summary stats for rentals within thresholds
dat_below_5000_prepared <- dat_agg_all_trimmed %>%
  filter(!is.na(mean_distance)) %>%
  mutate(
    radius = as.character(radius),
    inverse_spill_count = spill_count / mean_distance,
    inverse_spill_hrs = spill_hrs / mean_distance,
    log_price = log(listing_price)
  )

summary_table_below <- dat_below_5000_prepared %>%
  group_by(radius) %>%
  summarise(
    threshold_m = first(radius),
    mean_distance_m = mean(mean_distance, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_rentals = dplyr::n_distinct(rental_id),
    n_spill_sites = mean(n_spill_sites, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_price = mean(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_price = median(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_price = sd(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_price = min(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_price = max(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  select(-radius) %>%
  arrange(mean_distance_m)

summary_table <- bind_rows(summary_table_below, dat_above_5000)

reactable(
  summary_table,
  columns = list(
    threshold_m = colDef(
      name = "Threshold (m)",
      format = colFormat(digits = 0)
    ),
    mean_distance_m = colDef(
      name = "Mean Dist. (m)",
      format = colFormat(digits = 0)
    ),
    n_rentals = colDef(
      name = "# Rentals",
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE)
    ),
    n_spill_sites = colDef(
      name = "# Spill Sites",
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 1)
    ),
    mean_price = colDef(
      name = "Mean (£)",
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)
    ),
    median_price = colDef(
      name = "Median (£)",
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)
    ),
    sd_price = colDef(
      name = "SD (£)",
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)
    ),
    min_price = colDef(
      name = "Min (£)",
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)
    ),
    max_price = colDef(
      name = "Max (£)",
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)
    )
  ),
  columnGroups = list(
    colGroup(name = "Observations", columns = c("n_rentals", "n_spill_sites")),
    colGroup(
      name = "Price Statistics",
      columns = c(
        "mean_price",
        "median_price",
        "sd_price",
        "min_price",
        "max_price"
      )
    )
  ),
  defaultColDef = colDef(
    headerStyle = list(fontSize = "0.8em", whiteSpace = "wrap"),
    style = list(fontSize = "0.75em"),
    minWidth = 80
  ),
  resizable = TRUE,
  filterable = FALSE,
  defaultPageSize = 10,
  compact = TRUE,
  style = list(maxWidth = "100%", overflowX = "auto")
)
```

#### By Spill Count {#sec-03-02-02-by-spill-count}

```{r, rentals_spill_summary_by_count}
threshold <- 2000
treshold_label <- paste0(threshold / 1000, "km")

spill_counts_base <- dat_agg_all_trimmed %>%
  filter(radius == threshold)

spill_counts_quantiles <- quantile(
  filter(spill_counts_base, !is.na(mean_distance))$spill_count,
  probs = seq(0, 1, 0.25),
  na.rm = TRUE
)

spill_counts_summary_below <- spill_counts_base %>%
  filter(!is.na(mean_distance)) %>%
  mutate(
    quartile = cut(
      spill_count,
      breaks = spill_counts_quantiles,
      labels = c(
        "1st quartile (0-25%)",
        "2nd quartile (25-50%)",
        "3rd quartile (50-75%)",
        "4th quartile (75-100%)"
      ),
      include.lowest = TRUE,
      right = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(quartile) %>%
  summarise(
    spill_count_min = min(spill_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    spill_count_max = max(spill_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    spill_count_mean = mean(spill_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    spill_count_median = median(spill_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_rentals = n(),
    n_spill_sites = mean(n_spill_sites, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_price = mean(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_price = median(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_price = sd(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_price = min(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_price = max(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

rentals_below_threshold_ids <- dat_agg_all_trimmed %>%
  filter(radius == threshold) %>%
  pull(rental_id) %>%
  unique()

spill_counts_summary_above <- zoopla_rentals_trimmed %>%
  filter(!(rental_id %in% rentals_below_threshold_ids)) %>%
  summarise(
    quartile = paste0("Above ", treshold_label, " threshold"),
    spill_count_min = 0,
    spill_count_max = 0,
    spill_count_mean = 0,
    spill_count_median = 0,
    n_rentals = dplyr::n_distinct(rental_id),
    n_spill_sites = 0,
    mean_price = mean(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_price = median(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_price = sd(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_price = min(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_price = max(listing_price, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

spill_counts_summary <- bind_rows(
  spill_counts_summary_below,
  spill_counts_summary_above
)

reactable(
  spill_counts_summary,
  columns = list(
    quartile = colDef(name = "Spill Count Quartile"),
    spill_count_min = colDef(
      name = "Min Count",
      format = colFormat(digits = 0)
    ),
    spill_count_max = colDef(
      name = "Max Count",
      format = colFormat(digits = 0)
    ),
    spill_count_mean = colDef(
      name = "Mean Count",
      format = colFormat(digits = 1)
    ),
    spill_count_median = colDef(
      name = "Median Count",
      format = colFormat(digits = 1)
    ),
    n_rentals = colDef(
      name = "# Rentals",
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE)
    ),
    n_spill_sites = colDef(
      name = "# Spill Sites",
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 1)
    ),
    mean_price = colDef(
      name = "Mean (£)",
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)
    ),
    median_price = colDef(
      name = "Median (£)",
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)
    ),
    sd_price = colDef(
      name = "SD (£)",
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)
    ),
    min_price = colDef(
      name = "Min (£)",
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)
    ),
    max_price = colDef(
      name = "Max (£)",
      format = colFormat(separators = TRUE, digits = 0)
    )
  ),
  columnGroups = list(
    colGroup(
      name = "Spill Count Statistics",
      columns = c(
        "spill_count_min",
        "spill_count_max",
        "spill_count_mean",
        "spill_count_median"
      )
    ),
    colGroup(
      name = "Observations",
      columns = c("n_rentals", "n_spill_sites")
    ),
    colGroup(
      name = "Price Statistics",
      columns = c(
        "mean_price",
        "median_price",
        "sd_price",
        "min_price",
        "max_price"
      )
    )
  ),
  defaultColDef = colDef(
    headerStyle = list(fontSize = "0.8em", whiteSpace = "wrap"),
    style = list(fontSize = "0.75em"),
    minWidth = 80
  ),
  resizable = TRUE,
  filterable = FALSE,
  defaultPageSize = 10,
  compact = TRUE,
  style = list(maxWidth = "100%", overflowX = "auto")
)
```

:::

### Bivariate Plots {#sec-03-03-zoopla-bivariate}

```{r, bivariate_plots}
#| eval: false

# Sample data for plotting
set.seed(123)
sample_size <- 300000
sample_rentals <- unique(dat_agg_all_trimmed$rental_id) %>%
  sample(size = sample_size)

dat_agg_all_sample <- dat_agg_all %>%
  filter(rental_id %in% sample_rentals)
dat_agg_12mo_sample <- dat_agg_12mo %>%
  filter(rental_id %in% sample_rentals)

# Reshape data to long format
radius_levels <- c(250, 500, 1000, 2000, 5000)
plot_data <- bind_rows(
  dat_agg_all_sample %>%
    mutate(time_frame = "All Years", .before = 1),
  dat_agg_12mo_sample %>%
    mutate(time_frame = "12 Months", .before = 1)
) %>%
  filter(radius %in% radius_levels) %>%
  mutate(
    radius = factor(
      radius,
      levels = radius_levels,
      labels = paste0(radius_levels, "m")
    ),
    inverse_spill_count = spill_count / mean_distance,
    inverse_spill_hrs = spill_hrs / mean_distance,
    log_price = log(rent),
    listing_price = rent
  )

# Create plotting function
create_cs_plot <- function(
  x_var,
  x_label,
  y_var,
  y_label,
  method = c("lm", "loess"),
  time = NULL,
  title,
  facet = TRUE
) {
  # Optionally filter data by time_frame
  plot_df <- plot_data
  if (!is.null(time)) {
    plot_df <- plot_data %>% filter(time_frame == time)
  }

  # Base plot
  p <- ggplot(
    plot_df,
    aes(y = .data[[y_var]], x = .data[[x_var]], color = radius)
  ) +
    scale_color_viridis_d(option = "plasma", end = 0.8) +
    labs(
      x = x_label,
      y = y_label,
      color = "Radius",
      title = title
    ) +
    theme_pref +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")

  # Add smoothing lines
  if (length(method) == 1) {
    p <- p + geom_smooth(method = method, se = TRUE, linewidth = 0.5)
  } else {
    p <- p +
      geom_smooth(method = method[1], se = TRUE, linewidth = 0.5) +
      geom_smooth(method = method[2], se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.5, linetype = 5)
  }

  # Add faceting if requested
  if (facet) {
    p <- p + facet_grid(rows = vars(time_frame))
  }

  return(p)
}

# Define plot specifications for each variable
plot_specs <- list(
  spill_count = list(
    var = "spill_count",
    label = "Spill Count",
    title = "Spill Count Relationship"
  ),
  spill_hrs = list(
    var = "spill_hrs",
    label = "Spill Duration",
    title = "Spill Duration Relationship"
  ),
  mean_distance = list(
    var = "mean_distance",
    label = "Mean Distance to Spill Site",
    title = "Distance Relationship"
  ),
  inverse_spill_count = list(
    var = "inverse_spill_count",
    label = "Inverse Spill Count - Distance",
    title = "Inverse Spill Count - Distance Relationship"
  )
)

# Define plot variants: LM only, All Years, and 12 Months
variants <- list(
  lm = list(method = "lm", time = NULL, facet = TRUE),
  all = list(method = c("lm", "loess"), time = "All Years", facet = FALSE),
  `12mo` = list(method = c("lm", "loess"), time = "12 Months", facet = FALSE)
)

# Loop through each specification and variant to generate and save plots
for (var_name in names(plot_specs)) {
  spec <- plot_specs[[var_name]]

  for (variant_name in names(variants)) {
    v <- variants[[variant_name]]

    # Create the plot using create_cs_plot
    p <- create_cs_plot(
      spec$var,
      spec$label,
      "listing_price",
      "Listing Price (£)",
      method = v$method,
      time = v$time,
      title = spec$title,
      facet = v$facet
    )

    # Construct file name based on variable and variant
    file_name <- paste0("rental_", var_name, "_", variant_name, ".png")

    # Save the plot
    ggsave(
      filename = here("book", "book_figs", file_name),
      plot = p,
      width = 8,
      height = 0.618 * 6,
      dpi = 600
    )
  }
}
```

#### Spill Count {#sec-03-03-01-spill-count}

::: panel-tabset

##### Linear
```{r, plot_spill_count_lm}
knitr::include_graphics(here("book", "book_figs", "rental_spill_count_lm.png"))
```

##### All Years - Linear and LOESS
```{r, plot_spill_count_all}
knitr::include_graphics(here("book", "book_figs", "rental_spill_count_all.png"))
```

##### 12 Months - Linear and LOESS
```{r, plot_spill_count_12mo}
knitr::include_graphics(here(
  "book",
  "book_figs",
  "rental_spill_count_12mo.png"
))
```

:::

#### Spill Duration {#sec-03-03-02-spill-duration}

::: panel-tabset

##### Linear
```{r, plot_spill_hrs_lm}
knitr::include_graphics(here("book", "book_figs", "rental_spill_hrs_lm.png"))
```

##### All Years - Linear and LOESS
```{r, plot_spill_hrs_all}
knitr::include_graphics(here("book", "book_figs", "rental_spill_hrs_all.png"))
```

##### 12 Months - Linear and LOESS
```{r, plot_spill_hrs_12mo}
knitr::include_graphics(here("book", "book_figs", "rental_spill_hrs_12mo.png"))
```

:::

#### Distance {#sec-03-03-03-distance}

::: panel-tabset

##### Linear
```{r, plot_mean_distance_lm}
knitr::include_graphics(here(
  "book",
  "book_figs",
  "rental_mean_distance_lm.png"
))
```

##### All Years - Linear and LOESS
```{r, plot_mean_distance_all}
knitr::include_graphics(here(
  "book",
  "book_figs",
  "rental_mean_distance_all.png"
))
```

##### 12 Months - Linear and LOESS
```{r, plot_mean_distance_12mo}
knitr::include_graphics(here(
  "book",
  "book_figs",
  "rental_mean_distance_12mo.png"
))
```

:::

#### Inverse Spill Count - Distance {#sec-03-03-04-inverse}

::: panel-tabset

##### Linear
```{r, plot_inverse_spill_count_lm}
knitr::include_graphics(here(
  "book",
  "book_figs",
  "rental_inverse_spill_count_lm.png"
))
```

##### All Years - Linear and LOESS
```{r, plot_inverse_spill_count_all}
knitr::include_graphics(here(
  "book",
  "book_figs",
  "rental_inverse_spill_count_all.png"
))
```

##### 12 Months - Linear and LOESS
```{r, plot_inverse_spill_count_12mo}
knitr::include_graphics(here(
  "book",
  "book_figs",
  "rental_inverse_spill_count_12mo.png"
))
```

:::
